evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks for help with an Excel formula
evals.prompt: I need a formula to look up a product price from a table based on the product name

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about building a dashboard
evals.prompt: How do I create a sales dashboard in Google Sheets with KPIs and charts?

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about pivot tables
evals.prompt: I have a dataset of sales transactions. How do I summarize revenue by region and quarter?

evals.description: Agent produces correct XLOOKUP formula with error handling
evals.prompt: Write me an XLOOKUP formula that finds an employee's department from a lookup table, returning 'Unknown' if not found

evals.description: Agent produces correct SUMIFS formula with multiple criteria
evals.prompt: Write a SUMIFS formula that totals sales amount where region is West and date is in 2025

evals.description: Agent writes a working VBA macro to format a report
evals.prompt: Write a VBA macro that bolds the header row, auto-fits all columns, and formats column D as currency

evals.description: Agent writes a working Google Apps Script to send an email report
evals.prompt: Write a Google Apps Script that reads a value from cell B2 on the Dashboard sheet and emails it as a weekly report

evals.description: Agent correctly explains scenario analysis with CHOOSE function
evals.prompt: How do I set up a base/bull/bear scenario switcher in my financial model so changing one cell updates everything?

evals.description: Agent warns against VLOOKUP and suggests alternatives
evals.prompt: Should I use VLOOKUP to build my lookup table?
I want to merge the header cells across columns A through E to make my report look nice

evals.description: Agent handles volatile function performance concern
evals.prompt: My spreadsheet is really slow. I use INDIRECT and OFFSET in hundreds of formulas. What's wrong?

evals.description: Agent does not invent non-existent Excel functions
evals.prompt: Can I use REGEXEXTRACT in Excel to parse a string?

evals.description: Agent does not suggest deprecated CONCATENATE for modern Excel
evals.prompt: How do I join text from multiple cells with a comma separator in Excel 365?

evals.description: Agent references the formula-patterns file for LAMBDA questions
evals.prompt: How do I create a reusable custom function in Excel without VBA?
